ogTitle: Craven Plateau vs Crawford River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Craven Plateau and Crawford River.
heading: Craven Plateau vs Crawford River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Craven Plateau, New South Wales and Crawford River, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Craven Plateau has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Crawford River (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Craven Plateau or Crawford River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Craven Plateau has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Crawford River scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Craven Plateau scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Crawford River scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Craven Plateau or Crawford River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Craven Plateau has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
